title: Session JSON required key validation
goal: Fail fast when a session JSON is missing required keys before execution begins
scope: Validate missing keys before runtime execution
Add focused tests for missing-key failure behavior
constraints: do not change runtime behavior outside session JSON preflight validation
allowed_changes_detail: docs/global_rules.md::session JSON required keys rule section
acceptance_criteria: AC-107-01: missing constraints key fails before execution and names constraints in the error message [test_missing_constraints_key_fails_fast]
AC-107-02: multiple missing keys are reported in deterministic order [test_multiple_missing_keys_reported_deterministically]
AC-107-03: valid session JSON passes required-key validation [test_valid_session_json_passes_required_key_validation]
AC-107-04: provider call is not attempted when required keys are missing [test_missing_required_keys_do_not_call_provider]
AC-107-05: existing report flow remains unchanged for valid sessions [test_valid_session_preserves_existing_flow]
